summary: Tested Admin Shift Management features for Arabic RTL POS system. Core functionality working: Admin correctly uses cashier's shift instead of their own. Backend APIs (shifts/current, shifts/auto-open, shifts/open-for-cashier, cashiers-list) working correctly. Minor issue: cash-register/summary returns 404 when branch_id not passed (frontend should pass branch_id from current shift).

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to Pydantic validation errors - some old shifts have opening_balance instead of opening_cash, and branch_id is null
Returns 404 for admin when branch_id not passed as query param. Works correctly when branch_id is provided.

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard.js openCashRegister() doesn't pass branch_id to /api/cash-register/summary endpoint. Should get branch_id from activeShift and pass it.

action_items: Frontend: In Dashboard.js openCashRegister(), pass branch_id from activeShift to /api/cash-register/summary endpoint
Backend (optional): Fix GET /api/shifts endpoint to handle legacy shifts with opening_balance instead of opening_cash
critical_code_review_comments: shifts/current correctly prioritizes cashier shifts over admin shifts
shifts/auto-open correctly returns 404 for admin when no cashier shift exists
shifts/open-for-cashier correctly creates shift with opened_by tracking
Order creation uses effective_cashier_id from shift (verified in server.py line 4852)

success_rate.backend: 64% (7/11 tests passed - 4 failures due to super admin login endpoint name and shifts list validation)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (core flows working, minor cash register dialog issue)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test cashier 'كاشير تجريبي'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin shift management working correctly. Admin uses cashier's shift (not their own). Current open shift is for 'كاشير تجريبي' (Test Cashier). Super admin login endpoint is /api/super-admin/login with secret_key field (not secret). GET /api/shifts has validation issues with legacy data.
verified_features: Admin does NOT auto-open shift for themselves (shifts/auto-open returns 404 or existing cashier shift)
GET /api/shifts/current returns cashier's shift for admin
POST /api/shifts/open-for-cashier allows admin to open shift for cashier
Badge shows 'الوردية كاشير تجريبي' (Shift: Test Cashier) in header
Console log confirms: 'المالك يستخدم وردية الكاشير: كاشير تجريبي'
POS page loads correctly with shift info
